transcript.text: The Assistant is basically a contextual window that you can use to start anything you want.

I get it.

You can call any other artifacts as well.
So if you have additional artifacts defined here, so in Biologica we have some of these dossiers defined, you can add these other dossiers.
We'll work on the little ellipses here, but at the very least you can hover them to see which ones you've picked.
So you can add other contextual documents to this as well, and then

You can do that work here.

You can paste copy in here and edit it.
You can do all kinds of stuff.

it.
